templates.name: Product Demo Follow-up
templates.subject: Quick follow-up regarding our product demo
templates.body:
Hi {name},

It was great speaking with you today about how we can help {company} automate your workflow. I wanted to follow up and see if you had any questions regarding the pricing plans we discussed.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
Anshul

templates.name: Monthly Product Newsletter
templates.subject: Exciting updates for {company} in May!
templates.body:
Hi {name},

We're thrilled to share our latest product updates with the team at {company}.

This month, we've launched our fully automated email sender! No more copy-pasting, no more manual mistakes. You can now send personalized bulk emails in seconds.

Let us know if you would like a guided tour of the new features.

Cheers,
Anshul

templates.name: Invoice Reminder
templates.subject: Friendly Reminder: Outstanding invoice for {company}
templates.body:
Hi {name},

Hope you're doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the outstanding invoice for {company} is due next week. Please let me know if you have any questions or need us to resend the secure payment link.

Thank you for your business!

Best regards,
Anshul

templates.name: Buyer's Credit
templates.subject: Price Quote Request: Buyer's Credit Transaction
templates.body:
Dear Sir,


Kindly provide the price for below buyer's credit transactions: -


Transaction No. 1


1. Applicant Name – Ellecha Global Private Limited.

2. SBLC Issuing Bank: Yes Bank

3. Amount: USD 102,000.00 

4. Tenor: 60 days

5. Supplier's Name: ANHUI MEIJIA NEW MATERIALS CO., LTD., China

6. Due Date - 31/05/2026

7. Date of Shipment - 11/01/2026

8. Port of Loading: Shanghai, China 

9. Port of Discharge: India

10. Commodity: SOLID EPOXY RESIN 




Thanks and Regards,
Chitra Ray
Credance
9836087478

history.subject: Hi
history.body: Hi my name is anshul

history.subject: Quick follow-up regarding our product demo
history.body:
Hi Eva Davis,

It was great speaking with you today about how we can help Hooli Inc automate your workflow. I wanted to follow up and see if you had any questions regarding the pricing plans we discussed.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
Anshul

history.subject: Friendly Reminder: Outstanding invoice for Globex Corp
history.body:
Hi Bob Johnson,

Hope you're doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the outstanding invoice for Globex Corp is due next week. Please let me know if you have any questions or need us to resend the secure payment link.

Thank you for your business!

Best regards,
Anshul
